text.message: i think u gotta take 6 4 3 red
Is everyone just handing this to red?
Laughing cause you know I’m right
If you play bad I’ll call it out again
You sure love to talk for someone who doesn’t like others talking
Blue got it this time, nbd
I'll do nb nb.  Have a knight
Yeah but my default is the 8
Want to do nb nb?  I'll put on the 4
